mdRecord.dcterms:title: War Time Correspondence to Capt. Sticleman and Floyd Riflemen from William Richards
mdRecord.dcterms:description: War time correspondence, to Capt. Sticleman and Floyd Riflemen from William Richards at Rappahannock Station, Fauquier Co., Va, 2 original pieces – letter and envelope.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Soldiers
United States
Correspondence
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
